jon-ajinga.name: Jon Ajinga
jon-ajinga.title: Writer, editor, and independent publisher
jon-ajinga.bio: Jon Ajinga is the founding editor of The Freethinking Times, covering regulation, institutional power, and the life of ideas.
jon-ajinga.bioLong:
Jon Ajinga founded The Freethinking Times in 2025 as an independent publication for long-form reporting and analysis — the kind of work mainstream outlets increasingly can't afford to do and platform publishers won't.

Before The Freethinking Times he worked as a software engineer, an organiser, and (briefly, badly) a bartender. He reads too much philosophy and not enough fiction. His coverage focuses on regulatory capture, administrative agencies, and the quiet institutional decisions that shape public life.

He lives in Denver with his family and a very opinionated cat.

staff.name: The Freethinking Times
staff.title: Independent journalism — investigative, philosophical, adversarial to power
staff.bio: Stories reported and edited by the staff of The Freethinking Times.
staff.bioLong:
The Freethinking Times is an independent publication founded in 2025. We cover regulation, institutional power, the history of ideas, and the life of reason — without advertisers, without paywalls, and without deference to official narratives.

Staff bylines appear on pieces with significant editorial or research contributions from multiple team members, or on institutional content such as corrections, policy notices, and editorial statements.

The publication is reader-funded. Every piece is written, edited, and published entirely by human beings who answer to readers and no one else.
